mapper.select:
SELECT m.id,m.content, m.title, um.create_time AS createTime,um.is_read,m.type FROM tb_user_message um JOIN tb_message m ON um.message_id = m.id WHERE um.receiver_id = #{userMessagePageDTO.userId} AND um.platform_scope in
#{platformScope}
AND um.is_read = 0
AND um.is_read = 1
ORDER BY um.create_time DESC
